If this addresses a BZ, could you included the BZ number  in the description please?
Ah, v1.9 CI is still hosed after the libpod->podman move.
@TomSweeneyRedHat I'm hesitant to do that for internal-only BZs.
@mheon, that's a very good point and I'd forgotten that BZ was one.  SGTM
A friendly reminder that this PR had no activity for 30 days.
I don't see us ever updating 1.9 branch so closing.
